stemHtml: A pilot should check the wheels and tyres during their pre-flight check, which statement is correct?

options.a: If tread separation is left undetected, the tyre could burst during take-off or landing.
options.b: Tread inspection is the responsibility of the maintenance personnel before the first flight of the day.
options.c: The tyre treads are not an important item to be checked during the pre-flight inspection.
options.d: Tread separation is easy to detect.
